summary: The 30 June 2026 review published as a no-material-change edition: the dashboard held its late-June breast-cancer approvals while official-source checks did not justify a new promotion.
provenance: Derived from the current working tree with the July 2026 Tregzi addition removed to recreate the 30 June 2026 no-change review edition.

headlines.title: No new material dashboard item cleared the bar
headlines.summary: Official-source checks did not surface a post-28 June development strong enough for responsible inclusion.

headlines.title: ASCENT-04 remained the most recent verified approval
headlines.summary: The shortcut rail still pointed to the 24 June 2026 TNBC approval as the latest regulator-confirmed milestone in the dashboard.

headlines.title: Workforce and screening caution signals remained active
headlines.summary: The dashboard preserved system-level warnings and negative screening evidence rather than dropping them on quiet regulatory days.
